datasets.title: MolGap | Reference | Original 1M Assets
datasets.subtitle: Unpromoted 1M continuation assets retained for reproducibility
datasets.description: Reference-only Phase 8 bundle: original 1M CSV, 2D embeddings, ETKDG 3D graphs, SchNet checkpoint, and dual-GPS fusion checkpoint. The 1M candidate failed the global acceptance gate and is not the production model.

datasets.title: MolGap | Eval | 1M Model Assets
datasets.subtitle: Frozen checkpoints used by paired Phase 8 acceptance evaluations
datasets.description: Evaluation-only checkpoint bundle for original 500K, original 1M, repair-v2, SchNet, GPS7, GPS9, and fusion comparisons. Keep private and immutable for reproducible paired metrics.

datasets.title: MolGap | Archive | Replay Fusion Negative
datasets.subtitle: Rejected replay-weighted 1M fusion checkpoint
datasets.description: Archived negative experiment. Replay-weighted frozen-embedding fusion did not repair the 1M PCQM regression and must not be used as a production model.

datasets.title: MolGap | Eval | PCQM4Mv2 Valid 5K
datasets.subtitle: Fixed external Gap proxy labels for paired acceptance tests
datasets.description: Immutable 5K PCQM4Mv2 validation subset used only for paired external Gap evaluation. This is a local proxy test, not an OGB leaderboard submission.

datasets.title: MolGap | Eval | Common OOD and Hard Labels
datasets.subtitle: Fixed common, OOD-1000, and P8-hard labeled evaluation table
datasets.description: Immutable B3LYP evaluation labels used for paired Phase 8 model comparisons. The common table is development evidence after residual-guided acquisition and is not a newly sealed promotion set.

datasets.title: MolGap | Active | Phase 8 Runtime Source
datasets.subtitle: Reusable inference and evaluation source bundle for cloud jobs
datasets.description: Small private source bundle used by Kaggle evaluation kernels. Reusable model logic mirrors src/molgap; experiment-specific wrappers remain in scripts/phase8/remote/kaggle.

datasets.title: MolGap | Archive | Repair V2 Fetch Checkpoints
datasets.subtitle: Durable acquisition rounds retained for reconstruction only
datasets.description: Archived repair-v2 acquisition checkpoints. The reconciled 726,966-row candidate union supplied the rejected repair-v2 and additive 1.5M experiments. Do not treat these files as a new training set.

datasets.title: MolGap | Archive | ETKDG 3D Graphs 300K
datasets.subtitle: Historical Phase 7/8 ETKDG graph cache
datasets.description: Archived 300K ETKDG PyG graph cache retained for historical reproduction. Current scaling experiments use the named Phase 8 caches instead.

datasets.title: MolGap | Archive | Bond 2D Graphs 300K
datasets.subtitle: Historical Phase 7/8 molecular graph cache
datasets.description: Archived 300K bond-aware PyG graph cache retained for historical reproduction. It is not the current 1M training cache.

datasets.title: MolGap | Archive | Legacy Hybrid Graph Cache
datasets.subtitle: Historical 300K hybrid experiment asset
datasets.description: Legacy descriptor-enhanced 3D graph asset from the early hybrid experiment. Retained only for Phase 7/early Phase 8 reproducibility.

datasets.title: MolGap | Reference | Acquisition Exclusion Base
datasets.subtitle: Rejected 1.5M table plus prior repair-union identities
datasets.description: Reference bundle for future acquisition exclusion. It contains the rejected additive 1.5M labeled table and the 726,966-row prior repair identity union. Despite the historical slug, this is not a completed 2M dataset.

datasets.title: MolGap | Active | Residual Target Round 01
datasets.subtitle: Recovered 45,457-row residual-focused B3LYP acquisition
datasets.description: Recovered residual-target acquisition with 45,457 unique labeled molecules. It contributes to the controlled original-1M plus 97,798-row uniform pilot; use the newer scaffold-sealed split for promotion evaluation.
